_meta.description: General power modifiers (extras and flaws) for Mutants & Masterminds 4e. All 'description' fields are original, short paraphrases written for this project, not taken from the rulebook. Mechanical fields (category, costFormula, flat) reflect game rules/facts, not copyrighted prose. Companion to docs/mm-powers-architecture.md (read first) and effects.json. A handful of effects also define their own effect-specific extras/flaws not listed here (e.g. Enhanced Trait's 'Reduced Trait' flaw) — treat this file as the general-purpose modifier pool that applies broadly across effects.

categoryKey.extra: Increases an effect's cost and adds a benefit
categoryKey.flaw: Decreases an effect's cost and adds a restriction

_meta.flatNote: flat: true means the cost is a one-time addition/reduction to the effect's total, not multiplied by rank. flat: false means the cost applies per rank of the effect.
_meta.rankedNote: ranked: true means the modifier is bought in its own ranks (chosen independently of the effect's rank), so its total contribution is costValue x its rank. These are the flat modifiers whose costFormula reads 'per rank'. Absent/false means it is applied once (rank 1).
_meta.overridesNote: overrides maps a base-effect game-term field (range, action, duration, resistance, check, effectType) to the value this modifier forces it to, for the generated game-terms summary (not the point cost). Later modifiers win. Example: Ranged sets range to 'Ranged', replacing a Close or Perception base.
_meta.costValueNote: costValue is the canonical numeric cost magnitude used for automatic point-cost calculation; its sign is implied by category (extra adds, flaw subtracts) and flat decides whether it applies once or per rank. The costFormula string carries the full nuance (ranges, tiers) for cases costValue simplifies.
_meta.impactNote: Beyond 'overrides' (a literal field replacement), a modifier may declare other game-term impacts read by core.rules.effect_stat_rows for the summary (never the point cost): 'checkBonus' is a SIGNED adjustment to the effect's attack-roll number, multiplied by the modifier's rank (Accurate +2, Inaccurate -2); 'dropsCheck' removes the attack roll entirely (Perception Range); 'checkNote' is a parenthetical appended to the check row (Area keeps its attack roll but notes Dodge-for-half); 'stepField'+'stepBy' move a field that many steps along its gameTermLadders ordering (Increased Duration steps duration +1, Increased Action steps action +1 toward slower).

durationActionFloorNote: durationActionFloor maps a resulting duration to the minimum action its effect must take: a Sustained effect has to be toggled on and maintained with at least a free action, so an effect whose action is below this floor (a Permanent effect made toggleable by the Sustained extra carries action 'None') is raised to it in the game-terms summary. Read by core.rules against the gameTermLadders 'action' order.

modifiers.name: Accurate
modifiers.description: Bonus to attack checks made with this effect (+2 per rank).

modifiers.name: Affects Objects
modifiers.description: Lets a personal effect also work on objects.

modifiers.name: Affects Others
modifiers.description: Lets a personal effect be granted to other people.

modifiers.name: Alternate Effect
modifiers.description: Adds another interchangeable configuration to a power array. Applied automatically by a power/group's Array structure, not dragged onto an effect.

modifiers.name: Area Effect
modifiers.description: Expands the effect to hit an area instead of a single target.

modifiers.name: Aura
modifiers.description: Turns a close-range effect into a field surrounding your body.

modifiers.name: Contagious
modifiers.description: Spreads the effect to anyone who touches an affected target.

modifiers.name: Dimensional
modifiers.description: Lets the effect reach into other dimensions.

modifiers.name: Extended Range
modifiers.description: Increases how far a ranged effect can reach.

modifiers.name: Extra Condition
modifiers.description: Affliction only: also inflicts a second condition of the same degree at each degree of failure.

modifiers.name: Feature (as extra)

config.label: Feature
config.hint: The minor capability this adds (e.g. 'always lands on your feet').

modifiers.description: Bolts a minor extra capability onto another effect.

modifiers.name: Hardened
modifiers.description: Improves Toughness resistance checks and reduces damage conditions on a strong result.

modifiers.name: Homing
modifiers.description: Gives a ranged attack a second chance to hit if it misses.

modifiers.name: Impenetrable
modifiers.description: Like Impervious, but also blocks Penetrating effects.

modifiers.name: Impervious
modifiers.description: Grants outright immunity to lower-rank effects and avoids damage conditions on a strong resistance check.

modifiers.name: Increased Duration
modifiers.description: Moves an effect's duration up a step (e.g. Instant to Concentration).

modifiers.name: Increased Mass
modifiers.description: Increases how much mass a carrying/moving effect can handle.

modifiers.name: Incurable
modifiers.description: Damage from this effect resists being healed by outside means.

modifiers.name: Indirect
modifiers.description: Lets a ranged effect originate from somewhere other than you.

modifiers.name: Insidious
modifiers.description: Makes the effect's results hard to notice, even if the effect itself is visible.

modifiers.name: Linked
modifiers.description: Bundles two or more effects to always activate together as one. Applied automatically by a power/group's Linked structure, not dragged onto an effect.

modifiers.name: Multiattack
modifiers.description: Lets an attack effect hit multiple targets, or one target multiple times, in one action.

modifiers.name: Penetrating
modifiers.description: Partially overcomes Resistance and Impervious on the target.

modifiers.name: Perception Range
modifiers.description: Lets the effect target anything you can accurately perceive, no attack roll needed.

modifiers.name: Precise
modifiers.description: Allows fine, delicate control when using the effect for detail work.

modifiers.name: Ranged
modifiers.description: Turns a close-range effect into one usable at a distance.

modifiers.name: Reach
modifiers.description: Extends a close-range effect's reach by a space per rank.

modifiers.name: Reaction
modifiers.description: Lets the effect be triggered with your reaction under a chosen circumstance.

modifiers.name: Reversible
modifiers.description: Lets you remove the effect's conditions at will as a free action.

modifiers.name: Ricochet
modifiers.description: Lets a ranged effect bounce off surfaces to reach around cover.

modifiers.name: Secondary Effect
modifiers.description: Hits the target again automatically on the following round.

modifiers.name: Selective
modifiers.description: Lets you choose exactly who is and isn't affected.

modifiers.name: Split
modifiers.description: Divides the effect's rank between two or more targets at once.

modifiers.name: Subtle

config.label: Points
config.hint: 1 point: noticeable with an effort (a check); 2 points: undetectable.

modifiers.description: Makes the effect itself hard or impossible to notice being used.

modifiers.name: Sustained (as extra)
modifiers.description: Turns a Permanent effect into one that can be toggled on and off.

modifiers.name: Thrown
modifiers.description: Lets a close-range attack be hurled to hit at a distance.

modifiers.name: Triggered

config.label: Trigger
config.hint: The event that sets it off (e.g. 'when I take damage').

modifiers.description: Lets you pre-set the effect to activate automatically on a chosen event.

modifiers.name: Variable Descriptor

config.label: Descriptor pool
config.hint: Which descriptors it can shift between, or 'any' (GM discretion).

modifiers.description: Lets you change the effect's descriptor (fire, cold, sonic, etc.) on the fly.

modifiers.name: Activation
modifiers.description: The whole power needs an extra action to switch on before any of its effects can be used.

modifiers.name: Check Required
modifiers.description: Using the effect requires an extra check that can simply fail.

modifiers.name: Close (reduced range)
modifiers.description: Drops a Ranged or Perception-range effect down to Close range.

modifiers.name: Concentration (reduced duration)
modifiers.description: Drops a Sustained effect down to needing active Concentration to maintain.

modifiers.name: Diminished Range
modifiers.description: Shortens a ranged effect's short/medium/long distances.

modifiers.name: Distracting
modifiers.description: Using the effect leaves you Vulnerable until your next turn.

modifiers.name: Fades
modifiers.description: The effect loses potency with each use until it needs to recharge.

modifiers.name: Feedback
modifiers.description: Damaging the effect's manifestation hurts you too.

modifiers.name: Grab-Based
modifiers.description: You must successfully grab the target before the effect can work.

modifiers.name: Inaccurate
modifiers.description: Penalty on attack checks made with this effect (-2 per rank).

modifiers.name: Increased Action
modifiers.description: Using the effect requires a slower action type than normal.

modifiers.name: Independent
modifiers.description: No upkeep needed, but the effect weakens by a rank every round until it fades.

modifiers.name: Limited

config.label: Limited to
config.hint: The circumstance or target it is restricted to (e.g. 'only at night').

modifiers.description: Only works in specific circumstances or on specific targets.

modifiers.name: Limited to While Insubstantial
modifiers.description: The effect only works while one of your Insubstantial powers is currently active.

modifiers.name: Noticeable
modifiers.description: A standing effect has some obvious, unavoidable tell.

modifiers.name: Permanent (locked on)
modifiers.description: A Continuous effect becomes always-on and can never be switched off.

modifiers.name: Quirk

config.label: Quirk
config.hint: The minor nuisance or drawback (e.g. 'always speaks in rhyme').

modifiers.description: A minor, mostly cosmetic nuisance attached to the effect.

modifiers.name: Removable
modifiers.costFormula: -1, -2, or -4 points per 5 total points (by tier)

config.label: Tier
config.hint: How readily the item is taken away (a simplified flat discount, not the full per-5-points formula).

modifiers.description: The power can be taken away from you under the right circumstances.

modifiers.name: Resistible
modifiers.description: Grants a resistance check to an effect that normally wouldn't allow one.

modifiers.name: Sense-Dependent
modifiers.description: The target must be able to perceive the effect's source for it to work.

modifiers.name: Short-Term
modifiers.description: The effect only works for a handful of uses before it needs to recharge.

modifiers.name: Side Effect

config.label: Backfire
config.hint: What the side effect does to you.

modifiers.description: Failing to land the effect (or always, at the higher cost) backfires on you.

modifiers.name: Tiring
modifiers.description: Using the effect leaves you Fatigued, like spending Extra Effort.

modifiers.name: Uncontrolled
modifiers.description: You don't control when or how the effect activates — the GM does.

modifiers.name: Unreliable
modifiers.description: The effect has a real chance of simply not working each time you use it.
